title: calophyllum bicolor
intro: Calophyllum bicolor, also known as the White Kuiling or Borneo White Calophyllum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Calophyllaceae, native to the tropical forests of Borneo. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calophyllum bicolor include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its potential in reducing inflammation and improving cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are often used in traditional remedies and modern pharmaceutical applications.
